query:
SELECT configKey, 
  CASE WHEN configValue = '' OR configValue IS NULL THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
       WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,8), '...', RIGHT(configValue,4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
       ELSE configValue
  END as preview,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%'
ORDER BY configKey;
command:

       WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue,8), '...', RIGHT(configValue,4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
       ELSE configValue
  END as preview,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%'
ORDER BY configKey;
